new_value:
{"description":"## Problem

When a crew member's Claude process exits (context limit, crash, /exit, compaction),
the tmux pane goes dead and nothing brings it back. Every other agent type has a
restart mechanism:

- Deacon: SetAutoRespawnHook (tmux pane-died hook)
- Witness/Refinery: Daemon heartbeat loop
- Polecats: Witness zombie detection
- Crew: NOTHING

## Root Cause

crew.Manager.Start() (internal/crew/manager.go) creates the session but never:
1. Calls SetAutoRespawnHook() — no tmux-level respawn
2. Registers for daemon heartbeat monitoring — daemon only scans witness/refinery

## Fix

Add SetAutoRespawnHook() call in crew.Manager.Start() after session creation
(after line ~846 in manager.go). This gives crew the same tmux pane-died
auto-respawn that the deacon has.

Optionally also add crew scanning to the daemon heartbeat loop for belt-and-suspenders."}
